授業目的: The purpose of this course is to help students write their graduating thesis.
到達目標: Students are expected to complete their theses by the end of this course.

トピック.授業計画1: To be determined in consultation with supervisor. 《2,700minutes》
トピック.授業外学習2: To be determined in consultation with supervisor.

教科書/Required texts0: To be determined in consultation with supervisor.
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: Each course is positioned within the curriculum in accordance with the diploma policy andcurriculum policy established by each undergraduate/graduate school. By proceeding with the study of this course with an awareness of the DP and CP, the following abilities expected by each undergraduate/graduate school will be developed.Research Seminars:1. Understanding and analytical skills regarding international issues: the ability to understand and analyze various regions of the world from different perspectives in the humanities and social sciences.2. Problem-solving skills: the ability to proactively identify problems and solve them based on appropriate methods.3. Intercultural understanding and multicultural coexistence: the ability to be sensitive to different cultures and to coexist with diverse cultures.4. Ethical Values: Acquiring it though ‘liberal arts education for human growth’ based on Christian principles.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
